name: Bori Cha (Roasted Unhulled Barley Water Tea)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the barley in a large skillet over moderate heat for about 10 minutes, stirring and shaking the pan occasionally, until the grains are dark coffee brown.
2. Allow the toasted barley to cool completely.
3. Add the cooled barley to the boiling water and simmer over low heat for 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh strainer or cheesecloth into a large pot or container, discarding the barley.
5. Allow the tea to cool to room temperature; serve immediately or refrigerate until desired serving time.
Makes 5 cups.
